category_sources: The official GNU AutoGen page describes it as generating program files with repetitive text.
source_facts.description says AutoGen is an automated text file generator.
display_name_sources: The Savannah project is grouped as official GNU software.
The official GNU page identifies the project as AutoGen.
docs_sources: The GNU AutoGen manual is hosted under the official gnu.org software/autogen path.
The official GNU AutoGen homepage links to full online documentation.
repo_sources: The official Savannah autogen page lists a Git repository and browse source repository under git.savannah.gnu.org.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository lookup was required.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists autogen and related command-line tools.
